title: Pemulwuy Kitchen Remodel & Office Fitout
summary: Pemulwuy project combining a kitchen remodel with office-style joinery and built-in storage fitout work.
heroAlt: Pemulwuy kitchen remodel with study nook and living-room storage
overview: This Pemulwuy project is useful because it combines two different joinery needs in one brief: a kitchen update and office-style fitted storage. That makes it a stronger example of custom joinery solving how the home works overall, not just how one room looks in photos.

afterImages.alt: Pemulwuy finished study nook with white cabinetry and timber desk
afterImages.caption: Completed study nook joinery in Pemulwuy with white cabinetry, timber desk and overhead storage.

afterImages.alt: Pemulwuy study nook from a wider angle
afterImages.caption: Another view of the completed Pemulwuy study nook showing the full cabinetry and desk run.

afterImages.alt: Pemulwuy study nook with built-in desk and storage
afterImages.caption: Study nook joinery in Pemulwuy with a built-in desk, overhead storage and a compact work zone.

afterImages.alt: Pemulwuy living room with study nook joinery in background
afterImages.caption: Living room view showing how the Pemulwuy study nook joinery sits within the open-plan layout.
Kitchen view from the living area showing the completed cabinetry and open-plan layout.

beforeImages.alt: Pemulwuy room before study nook fitout
beforeImages.caption: Empty room before the Pemulwuy study nook and storage fitout was installed.
Open-plan area during renovation showing the kitchen and living space before the joinery was installed.
Another before view of the Pemulwuy space prior to the joinery fitout.

spaces.title: Kitchen remodel
spaces.text: The kitchen component focused on cleaner joinery and a better layout base for day-to-day use.

spaces.title: Office fitout
spaces.text: The office-style joinery gave the project a more custom built-in feel, adding useful workspace storage without breaking the finish direction of the home.

outcome: The completed work shows how different spaces can still feel connected when the joinery is planned as one brief rather than a sequence of separate upgrades.
ctaText: If you are planning a kitchen remodel or office-style fitout in Pemulwuy, send through your current layout and we can help shape the scope.
